key_observations: Capital drawdown: -19% (500 → 404.81) with only 1 resolved trade (loss)
Trader offline 94 minutes despite 5-min cron schedule - execution failure
Zero activity in last 24h despite 4 open positions - monitoring breakdown
review.calibration_check: Insufficient resolved trades (n=1) to assess probability calibration; single loss provides no statistical signal.
recommended_actions: HALT: Fix cron/execution infrastructure before resuming - trader is not running
Review the 4 open positions manually for stale pricing or stuck orders
After infrastructure fix, restart in paper mode with reduced position sizing (50% current) until 10+ resolved trades accumulated
review.summary: Bot is effectively offline (94min delay, 0 trades in 24h) with -19% drawdown. Infrastructure failure detected - halt and repair execution system before any parameter tuning.
